listings.title: Unbranded 12" Long 1" Round Grip Flat 1/4" Head Solid Steel Screwdrive
listings.body: Unbranded 12" Long 1" Round Grip Flat 1/4" Head Solid Steel Screwdriver. In very good condition with no nicks.Top of grip is slightly rounded. The tool is forged from a single piece of steel, with a cylindrical handle that tapers into a shaft ending in a 1/4" flat tip. Useful for heavy-duty prying.
